title: Gemini 3.2 released by June 30, 2026?
description: Market on whether Google's Gemini 3.2 model is made available to the general public by June 30, 2026.
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Google's Gemini 3.2 model is made available to the general public by the specified date ET. Gemini 3.2 must be explicitly named or recognized as a direct successor to Gemini 3.1. Specialized non-text modality models, Gemini 4, closed betas, placeholders, and inaccessible labels do not qualify.
snapshot_note: Preliminary seed snapshot from public Polymarket page/search result; replace with API snapshot before locking v1.

title: Gemini 3.5 released by June 30, 2026?
description: Market on whether Google's Gemini 3.5 model is made available to the general public by June 30, 2026.
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Google's Gemini 3.5 model is made available to the general public by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Gemini 3.5 must be explicitly named or recognized as a successor to Gemini 3. Products labeled Gemini 4 or additional Gemini 3 models do not count. Closed beta or private access does not suffice.
snapshot_note: Preliminary seed snapshot from public Polymarket page/search result; replace with API snapshot before locking v1.

title: Will Google have the best AI model at the end of June 2026?
description: Outcome in the market group 'Which company has best AI model end of June?'
resolution_rules: Resolves according to the company that owns the model with the highest arena score on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard when checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET. Uses the Arena Score section on the Leaderboard tab at lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off.
snapshot_note: Preliminary seed snapshot from public Polymarket page/search result; replace with API snapshot before locking v1.

title: AI wins IMO gold medal in 2026?
description: Market on whether any AI gets a gold medal in the International Math Olympiad during 2026.
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if any AI gets a gold medal in the International Math Olympiad between January 1, 2026 and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Resolution sources are the IMO Grand Challenge and Artificial Intelligence Math Olympiad; if either source demonstrates an AI won the challenge or prize before the resolution date, the market resolves Yes.
snapshot_note: Preliminary seed snapshot from public Polymarket page/search result; replace with API snapshot before locking v1.

title: Will SpaceX have the highest IPO market cap in 2026?
description: Outcome in the market group 'Largest IPO by market cap in 2026?'
resolution_rules: Resolves to the company that achieves the highest market capitalization in U.S. dollars based on the official closing price on its first trading day in 2026. Eligible companies must complete an IPO between January 1 and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Ties resolve alphabetically. Resolution uses the primary exchange official listing page, or another reliable source if unavailable.
snapshot_note: Preliminary seed snapshot from public Polymarket page/search result; replace with API snapshot before locking v1.

description: Outcome in the market group 'Largest IPO by market cap in 2026?'
resolution_rules: Resolves to the company that achieves the highest market capitalization in U.S. dollars based on the official closing price on its first trading day in 2026. Eligible companies must complete an IPO between January 1 and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Ties resolve alphabetically. Resolution uses the primary exchange official listing page, or another reliable source if unavailable.
snapshot_note: Preliminary seed snapshot from public Polymarket page/search result; replace with API snapshot before locking v1.

title: SpaceX IPO Closing Market Cap
description: Market group on SpaceX's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.
resolution_rules: Resolves based on SpaceX's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading. If no SpaceX IPO occurs by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market resolves to 'No IPO before 2028'.
snapshot_note: Representative outcome price uses the 1.5T-2.0T bucket from public page/search result; this is adjacent to eval_006, not the best market.

title: Anthropic $500B+ valuation in 2026?
description: Market on whether Anthropic achieves a public valuation of at least $500B or raises a private round valuing it at least $500B in 2026.
resolution_rules: Resolves Yes if Anthropic achieves a public valuation of $500B or more, or raises a private funding round valuing the company at $500B or more between market creation and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Requires explicit confirmation by Anthropic or overwhelming consensus of credible reporting. Resolution source is Anthropic official communications, with credible-reporting consensus allowed.
snapshot_note: Preliminary seed snapshot from public Polymarket page/search result; replace with API snapshot before locking v1.

title: No IPO by June 30, 2026
description: Outcome in the market group 'Anthropic IPO Closing Market Cap'.
resolution_rules: Resolves based on Anthropic's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading. If no IPO occurs by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market resolves to 'No IPO by June 30, 2026'.
snapshot_note: Preliminary seed snapshot from public Polymarket page/search result; replace with API snapshot before locking v1.
